name: DB Table Source
shortDescription: Fetch a table or run a query against the CBR data platform
description: Authenticates with the CBR Keycloak, then either downloads a table from your approved access request or runs a custom SQL query using the cbr-data-access SDK, and stores the result in MinIO as Parquet for downstream nodes.

name.label: Node Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

table_name.label: Table Name
table_name.description: Bare table name to download from your approved access request (e.g. person, measurement). Leave blank if using a custom SQL query.

sql_query.label: Custom SQL Query (optional)
sql_query.description: Advanced: a custom SELECT query (plain table names resolve against your approved access request). If set, this overrides Table Name.
sql_query.placeholder: e.g. SELECT * FROM measurement WHERE value_as_number IS NOT NULL

request_id.label: Access Request ID (optional)
request_id.description: Only needed if you have more than one approved access request. The request UUID or req_... schema to use.

outputDescription: Data fetched from the database table or query as Parquet
